name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with K Transactions
description: You are given an array of prices where prices[i] is the price of a stock on the ith day, and an integer k. Find the maximum profit you can achieve with at most k transactions. A transaction consists of buying and then selling one share. You may not hold more than one share at a time (you must sell before you buy again).
signature: def max_profit(k: int, prices: list[int]) -> int:
constraints: When k >= n/2, optimize to O(n) unlimited transactions case
General case uses O(k*n) dynamic programming
